data.title: Baxter's shares fall as 2026 profit guidance disappoints. Q4 EPS at 44 cents, sales reach $2.974 billion, up 8% yoy.
data.description: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE: BAX) is currently trading near the lower end of its 52-week range between $17.4 and $37.74, as per data from Benzinga Pro. In the fourth quarter, Baxter reported an adjusted EPS of 44 cents, falling short of both the management guidance range of 52-57 cents and the Wall Street estimate of 54 cents. This decrease was mainly attributed to an unfavorable product mix. The company achieved sales of $2.974 billion in the quarter, marking an 8% increase year over year on a reported basis and a 3% increase on an operational basis, surpassing the consensus of $2.824 billion. Management had initially anticipated a 2% growth in fourth-quarter sales on a reported basis and a 2% decline on an operational basis. Medical Products & Therapies segment sales accounted for around $1.39 billion, showing a 6% increase on a reported basis and a 4% increase on an operational basis.

data.title: TRUCE® Software receives Series B funding to scale up its AI telematics for fleets and phone management tools for schools.
data.description: In Lisle, Illinois, TRUCE® Software recently completed a Series B funding round aimed at enhancing its mobile-first AI telematics designed for fleets and implementing phone management solutions for K-12 schools. The funding round garnered a significant investment to bolster the company's expansion plans.

data.title: Novo Nordisk plans to launch Wegovy in vials to compete with Eli Lilly in the obesity market. Lilly's vials are one-third of new patients, but Novo's pricing is undisclosed. Novo will first introduce the vials in the U.S. before other markets.
data.description: Novo Nordisk A/S (NVO) is set to introduce its widely-popular obesity drug Wegovy in vial format, as it strategizes to compete against Eli Lilly and Co. (LLY) in the growing weight-loss market. The drug is currently marketed in prefilled injector pens, but the company aims to diversify its offerings. Rival Lilly began offering vials of Zepbound in 2024 due to shortages, with CEO Dave Ricks noting vials now make up a third of new weight-loss therapy patients. Novo Nordisk has not revealed pricing for the vial format and plans to launch in the U.S. first before expanding to other markets. CEO Mike Doustdar leads this move to maintain a strong position in the face of increasing industry competition.

data.title: Grindr's "Who’s the A**hole?" podcast returns for Season 4 with host Katya, promising more queer excellence and humor.
data.description: In West Hollywood, California, Grindr is relaunching its popular podcast "Who's the Asshole?" for a fourth season. Hosted by drag queen and comedian Katya Zamolodchikova, the latest season promises queer excellence and humor. The podcast delves into outrageous scenarios, hot takes, and messy dilemmas with sharp wit and honesty. Grindr, known as the Global Gayborhood in Your Pocket™, is excited to bring back the award-winning show for fans.

data.title: Michael Nagy appointed as Senior VP of Development at Guardian, starting February 9, 2026. Will oversee development process.
data.description: Guardian, based in Portland, Oregon, revealed that Michael Nagy is now the Senior Vice President of Development starting February 9, 2026. In this role, Nagy will be in charge of Guardian's development activities, managing tasks from site procurement to funding arrangements, permits, design, and construction management. His recruitment aligns with Guardian's growth strategy, including numerous acquisition, preservation, and new development projects currently in progress.

data.title: Trex celebrates 30 years of innovation as the world's leading composite decking brand at IBS 2026.
data.description: In 1996, a group of four executives from Mobil’s Composite Products Division obtained the rights to an innovative wood-alternative decking material, which led to the establishment of a company that revolutionized the decking sector. Now, after thirty years, Trex Company [NYSE:TREX] has become the foremost brand for composite decking and railing globally, playing a significant role in reshaping outdoor living. At IBS 2026, Trex will continue its tradition of pioneering new ideas and shaking up the industry by introducing a compelling new product.

data.title: 2026 Top 25 Historic Hotels Worldwide® Most Romantic list has been revealed, featuring top romantic hotels globally.
data.description: The 2026 Top 25 Historic Hotels Worldwide® Most Romantic Hotels List has been released in Washington. This list highlights the top destinations worldwide for romantic getaways, featuring exceptional historic hotels. Celebrating the charm of these accommodations, the list includes a diverse range of properties known for their romantic ambiance. The announcement showcases 25 hotels that have been recognized for their unique appeal to couples, providing memorable experiences for guests seeking romance. This annual list serves as a guide for travelers seeking romantic escapes, offering a curated selection of distinctive historic hotels.

data.title: Bitcoin needs to end week at $68.3K to avoid 'bearish acceleration'. Failure may lead to mimicking 2022 bear market.
data.description: If bulls do not regain the 200-week exponential moving average by the week's end, Bitcoin could replicate its 2022 bear market trend. This warning comes from recent analysis, highlighting the significance of this key indicator. The cryptocurrency's performance in the coming days will be crucial in determining whether it can avoid a repeat of past market conditions.

data.title: Generational Group helps sell Construction Inspection Specialists, LLC to Jadida Capital, LLC in a deal closed on Sep 3, 2025.
data.description: A prominent mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, Generational Group, recently facilitated the sale of Construction Inspection Specialists, LLC to Jadida Capital, LLC. The transaction was finalized on September 3, 2025. Based in Windsor, California, Construction Inspection Specialists, LLC offers construction inspection and risk-management services across the country. The company serves various clients including lenders, investors, and developers by providing essential services such as property assessments and project monitoring.

data.title: BTC price expected to consolidate as per analysts, remaining between key cost-basis levels; prolonged period predicted despite active buying.
data.description: Analysts at Glassnode have noted that Bitcoin is currently trading within critical cost-basis levels. They predict that BTC may face an extended period of consolidation, despite traders continuing to purchase during downward moves towards the lower boundaries of the range.

data.title: Investors urged to contact Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP for investigation into PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) violations of federal securities laws. (character count: 156)
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on February 12, 2026, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is conducting an investigation into potential breaches of federal securities laws for investors of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL). This investigation comes after PayPal's announcement on February 3, 2026, about a possible violation. The law firm's website is www.ktmc.com.
